name: Linkding Plus
tagline: A self-hosted bookmark manager designed to be minimal, fast, and easy to set up. (Includes feature for archiving websites as HTML snapshots)
description:
A self-hosted bookmark manager designed to be minimal, fast, and easy to set up. (Includes feature for archiving websites as HTML snapshots)

Docs: https://linkding.link/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  linkding-plus:
    image: sissbruecker/linkding:latest-plus
    volumes:
      - linkding_data:/etc/linkding/data
    environment:
      - LD_SUPERUSER_NAME=u7cd5b8f945
      - LD_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD=e97f0d2cef5e1402ac0e751b2fd47811
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/9090' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42059:9090
volumes:
  linkding_data: null
